simple_types.name: CONFIG_ENABLE_Field
simple_types.code:

   Disable,
   Enable)
  with Size => 1;

simple_types.name: CONFIG_MODE_Field
simple_types.code:

   HighPassFilter,
   CapDiv)
  with Size => 1;
